data.content:
Use `&` to combine conditions in the `--filter` expression:

```
dotnet test --filter "ClassName~OrderServiceTests & TestCategory=Unit"
```

This will match only the 2 tests tagged `[TestCategory("Unit")]` inside `OrderServiceTests` — excluding the Integration tests in that class and all tests in `PaymentServiceTests`.

Want me to run it?
data.reasoningText:
The user wants to run only the Unit tests in the OrderServiceTests class. This is an MSTest project. They need to combine two filter conditions:
1. ClassName = OrderServiceTests
2. TestCategory = Unit

In MSTest with `dotnet test --filter`, you combine conditions with `&`:

```
dotnet test --filter "ClassName~OrderServiceTests & TestCategory=Unit"
```

This would match the 2 tests: `CreateOrder_ValidInput_ReturnsOrder` and `CreateOrder_NullInput_ThrowsException`.
